close_reason: Fixed in commit 28e4703 (add Debug impls across all backend structs)
description: src/lib.rs:67 defines pub struct BitwardenBackend with no Debug impl. Echoes crate-secretsx-39da.6 (aws-ssm), crate-secretsx-8bh8.8 (aws-sm), crate-secretsx-ojwd (aws-kms) — same gap, same crate shape. Public types in this workspace should #[derive(Debug)] by default. Manual Debug is needed here because access_token: Zeroizing<String> must not be debug-printed verbatim — derive Debug and add #[debug(...)] elision via derive_more, OR write a manual Debug that prints '<redacted>' for access_token and the OnceCell's contents (Client doesn't implement Debug usefully anyway). Manual is preferred to avoid pulling in derive_more for one struct.
title: BitwardenBackend missing #[derive(Debug)]
